column1: Hey Jackson, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
sorry I missed your response bro!
I got you tho! which destination were you looking to book
Honestly no clue just want to explore options you guys provide
I feel you broo. so Punta Cana and Cancun have been the most popular
I can send info on both. how many ppl in your group so far?
Right now 7, last spring break we had 22. I think once we get the ball rolling and people actually start paying more and more people will hop on
yea lets run it up. we just need a good package and everyone will want in
cool if I send the info through email? its a little long for text
just sent that over lmk if it came through. sent a bunch of options and I can hook it up with a deposit on some of the prices you see there. just lmk which one we wanna narrow down on
ill personally be in Punta Cana
Do you guys offer some sort of promo for the person organizing the trip?
yea for sure bro. if you get towards 15 ppl I can get you in on our amassador program where you can earn a free trip and possibly commission
15 ppl including yourself gets you the free stay! pretty light you could kill that
I was just curious because another organization offered it and I didn't see it in the email Which resort are you staying in at punta? You think the occidental is worth the price difference?
I think were gonna lock in grand oasis Cancun
I'll be at the Occidental Punta Cana. its honestly equally as lit as the Grand Oasis
I was going to say we changed our mind to occidental
A lot of the group's parents dont want them in Mexico
yea bro lets run it. ill hook it up for $729 on the 5 night or $599 on the 4 night
if we're tryna get the ball rollin asap
Sounds great man can you send a portal or something so I can start getting guys on board
ill send that rn brotha, give me like 5 if thats cool. did we want to do the 5 night?
Is there an option where some guys can do 4 and some can do 5? If not lets just rip the 5 nights
yea it would just have to be two diff reservations. think some guys would want to do less days? I think its best to all rip the same amount of days
bet bet. will make this rn and send it over
I am assuming the $729 rate is for a 4 person room, are the rates for 3, 2, and solo rooms the same (829, 899, and 1409 respectively)
yea you got it bro. $729 for 4 person. 3 person is $829 and 2 person is $899
ill hook it up for you for today on the 3 person if you need it. $799
Sounds great mean and I saw were already behind on the payment schedule, would we just pay what we already missed ($420)
nah I made a new one specifically for you bro
deposit today is $100 and then you catch up on the rest as the months go
Should I make an account first so it knows im the leader?
yea I would put your name at the top slot if you can. I opened up 8 for now, did you need any more
Just submitted my form and my $100, also sent the link to our group chats so people should slowly start filling them out
Bet that! Any questions come up just lmk

Hey sorry for being dry this week Ive been locked in on my exams. We had chapter last night and I showed off some of the stuff you offer and a lot of the guys are interested. Just had some quick questions - Are the different rooms going to be close together? (Like in the same building) - What resort-like activities are available (meaning not partying related) - Safety concerns in DR
Yo! All good bro hope midterms were aight. Glad the guys are interested let's get them in

Physical room numbers are assigned at the time of check in based on what they hotel has available the day and time you arrive. They assign those based on their specific availability. When you're at check in, and with the group, you can request the staff to put y'all as close to eachother as possible. In the same building, on the same floor, or next to eachother if available. Just like you'd do at a hotel here at home
Okay perfect sounds good, I made up this pdf to have everyone send to their friends just wanted your thoughts

For resort activites there's volleyball, archery, beach soccer, badminton, darts, water aerobic classes in the pool, dance classes and merengue, aerobics, basketball court, gym, yoga, giant chess and 2 tennis courts. There's also a spa
Appreciate it, some of these guys need to be spoon fed the info to get interested
LOL ay man you know how it is. I hear you. this is perfect tho
We lookin to potentially add more rooms to the res? thinkin youll get a lot of guys?
If so I can def hook you up with our group organizer perks for being the one that organized it all
You can earn a free stay at 15 people
I have 7 other guys that are locked in, gonna get them together to pay either later today or tomorrow and then once those guys get locked in I think more rooms will fill up
word good gameplan bro. everyone gets fomo once theres a core group locked in. and the price is super affordable in comparison to the package
That's what I'm saying. We did a bnb in Puerto Rico last year and this will be almost half as much for the same amount of time
yea bro and you'll be around like 1k other college students every day lol
Hey man expecting to get the boys signed up this week, can I add another 2-person room to the roster.
And the 2-person room so 3 additional total
How does the payment plan work for the guys that are just joining now?
they just gotta catch up on the payment plan tonight. so they'd do $300 for first payment
if thats tough for some of them lmk and I'll see what I can get adjusted
Yea if there's anyway we can push the first 200 back at least a week I'd appreciate it
word, whats the situation. are people hoppin in those tonight?
Yea I just got 2 people signed up, I accidentally made 2 fake accounts sending a demo video
yo so we wanted to move the $200 payment out by a week?
so the guys hopping in now would just have the $100 deposit
So what date exactly is that 200 pushed out to
Would have to be semi-soon! Just so they can catch up
I got a bunch of my guys signed up today, expecting to get 8 more by Thursday. Any shot you can remove "Joe Shmo" from room 1. That's a fake name for the demo video I sent to our gc
You got enough slots in there for everyone?
Can I add another 4 bedroom just in case
Expecting to get a few stragglers as the final deadline nears
yooo morning bro. I had the ops team update the deposit deadline to Thurs. im not able to add another room just yet until we start filling the empty one. if we need it text me and I'll add it quick
just cant have multiple empty rooms chillin
yeassir. lmk if anything tho, hows the feedback been with the boys?
Now that I have a few guys signed up and semi-paid it's so much easier getting guys on board
lol yea thats how it be bro
A lot more guys seem interested now that they're in, that's why I requested the additional room
Are there recommended windows for when my flight should be
honestly man the sooner the better for flights. they really only go up especially for spring break season
I meant like early in the day on the 14th
or do you mean like arrival time and departure time
And can you please remove Joe Schmo from room 1

honestly any time bro. id recommend landing early, getting there around noon-1p is the sweet spot. you get to the resort around 230-3 and thats when check in is usually just about ready. if not maybe an hour after
Yea a better question would've been when is check in? I just don't wanna find myself in a position wheee I'm either waiting around for check in to start or getting there super late

joe shmo cleared. check in is typically 4p but if rooms are ready when you arrive then youre good to go. ive seen it happen earlier a lot. just depends whats available based on the hotel's check outs that day
Hey man should be at 15 people in the portal by end of day tmrw. How will the discount for me work? Should I keep making payments and then I get a refund when all 15 are fully paid?
spot on bro, exactly. and you'll be reimbursed
in a perfect world it happens before your last payment date. as long as everyone is up to speed
yerrr what's good bro, checkin in. looks like we have 12 people on the reservation so far. Dom and Dev haven;t made any payments tho so theyre technically still not valid
I see a handful have missed the 2nd payment, I can push that out and blend it with the 3rd payment if its easier. just let me know
Jack brotha, any word on the rest of the guys?
My fault, guys are being snails. I think they're gonna take advantage of the dec30 final payment so to not get stuck in the payment plan and get hit with late fees
Ohh, yea it doesnt work that way bro lol
I meant for guys that haven't signed up yet
if they dont hop n or make payments their slots get closed down
The other guys Im not sure whats holding them back
yea man I would let them know waiting does them no good. rooms may not even be available mid december
they risk not making the trip
yoyo whats good bro hope thanksgiving was smooth. any word on those guys? operations team is about to cancel them tomorrow
What's up bro hope you had a good Thanksgiving I let everyone know that's falling behind they gotta pay up today. I'm paying in full tonight
And you mentioned there may potentially be more people joining?
Yes not sure how that works now tho
How many ppl we thinkin? Gonna have to just lmk as they hit you up saying they want to join, and I'll add the room(s) in right away for them to slide on
yoyo checkin in brodie. are Dev, Nick, and Dom out?
Nico signed up yesterday Dev and Dom may be out
Yoyo! any word on Nicholas? signed up but didnt deposit
I'll ask He only signed up a few days ago
Word yea but since he was behind on signing up he was supposed to deposit to secure his spot
All gucci. just tryna save my bros lol. want y'all all out there
Appreciate it I'll get them paid up asap
It's just Devran and Dom that haven't left?
Yea so rn Dev and Dom, and then you got 3 open slots. We can either get them filled or we'll just have to slightly adjust things
hey bro any word on Zach and Vikram
I'll text them right now, didn't mean to air you for so long I've been super busy
all good bro I know, finals, holiday etc. no worries just lmk
whats good bro you hear back from jackson and vikram?
my bad not you, Zach and Vikram lolol
They've been airing me I texted in our Groupchat I'll text them personally
damn. they must not be tryna go
Vikram is having troubles I'm sending him your number
He's ghosting me I'll press him tho before the deadline I know he has the cheese
I mean he may get deleted soon bro unfortunately
Ops team does there sweep and are ruthless
Hey man I have 2 guys trying to join they want their own room if that's possible I get it if not I know they're ruthless
hey man yea let me put the request in rn. are those guys ready to pay in full today?
its $899 per person for the 2 person room
There good to pay by today
bet! thats available now at the bottom of the reservation, last room
actually is it possible to make it a 3 bedroom I get it if not. These clowns love waiting til the very last second
whats good big dog. looks like everyone on your reservation is up to date. im gonna submit to start the process on your trip reimbursement
there will be a $75 system fee retained on the account just a heads up. for system and processing fees. the rest will all be reimbursed to you
Perfect Will it just refund my card or can I put it on a different one
Yea itll go back to wherever you made the payment
Hey man some of my friends tht are staying at diff resorts in Punta Cana same week as us have like a club schedule that they follow. Do we have anything like that?
yooooo yea bro will be sendng you all the sched this weekend
did you want to add the party pass to your accounts?
I thought we got that with 15+ people
you got the booze cruise yea! the nightclub party pass events tho are Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo and Maroca Nightclub
with the 15+ ppl you got the free stay
Oh okay that makes sense Does our resort follow the same club schedules as the surrounding resorts
it depends who they are traveling with
I meant the other resorts under spring break u
Like the one you're at I believe
Hey man do you know how I can withdraw the money from the website I have a -$509 balance. If possible id like to do a diff card
Also do you know which day our booze cruise would be? We are trying to plan other excursions

hey bro, your refund has already been reimbursed to the card you used to make they payment. that negative balance is showing that we sent you that amount. check your bank statement from the first and second week of Jan
I see, I see, I'll check
booze cruise will be march 15, 16, or 18. itll be assigned on arrival with our onsite staff. I'lll be sending your group a full itinerary breakdown tomorrow
yo btw we're waiting on flight info from these guys Frank Kevin Dom Jamiel Antonio Emmanuel Vikram
you know if theyre on the same flights as anyone else?
Yo I have a negative balance for the club nights I signed up for, am I gonna get screwed when I get down there?
The negative balance is because we refunded you for your free trip
Oh the vouchers on the portal that makes sense My friends dont see the discount booze cruise on their portals
Like my friends don't see it here
Looking now, looks like they both have it on their accounts
also btw bro we need flight info for a handful of people
Emmanuel Villa Antonio Olivera Jamiel Saenz Kevin Sheppard Frank Kopervos
Can my friends still add party packages
Jamiel is having issues adding coco bongo and imagine
Jamiel, he FaceTimed me and his portal looked different from mine. I didn't see the "buy add-ons" section
He wants coco and imagine? I'll add it for him
yo! those have been added for Jamiel he'll just have to pay his balance off today
Can you add the same for Frank and Vikram they can't add it either. They can pay right now
yooo safe travels today fam. see y'all soon
Appreciate it, the bulk of us just touched down
Yooo hope you're having a good time Nico didn't get his booze cruise voucher
checkin in bro. hows everything goin

Great thanks for asking Just curious about bus schedule for when we leave. I know checkout is at 12 but the front desk said we can stay as long as we want with our bags, just not sure if there is a "final bus" for the airport
yea, your shuttle to the airport is based on your departure flight time. but if thats after checkout youre still able to chill on the resort for sure
if you havent already, use this form to find out your shuttle time https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfEqKK3YnRKNnVBlS_k-MS4jEGI5SUIZT6m3D5XTEazTyFvCw/viewform?usp=send_form
